trades.reasoning: Premier AI semiconductor play with RSI in ideal bullish zone (58.9), full MACD bullish confirmation, price holding above SMA-20 — strong risk/reward in neutral market.
Cybersecurity leader with RSI 63.5 in bullish momentum zone, MACD crossover confirmed, and price well above SMA-20 — secular tailwind from enterprise security spending.
Optical networking beneficiary of AI data center buildout, RSI 56.7 with room to run, MACD bullish — momentum just beginning relative to peers.
5G infrastructure diversifier with RSI 58.4 in bullish zone and MACD crossover — low correlation to existing tech-heavy portfolio provides balance.

decisions.briefing: Markets were essentially flat today — NASDAQ eked out +0.1% while the S&P slipped -0.1%, a classically neutral session with no strong directional signal. With 4 open slots and over $1,200 in cash sitting idle, the rules demand deployment into best candidates. I targeted the four score-95 names whose RSI sits in the ideal 55–70 bullish momentum zone (not overbought), all with confirmed MACD crossovers — NVDA, ZS, AAOI, and NOK fill all remaining slots and diversify across AI semis, cybersecurity, optical networking, and telecom infrastructure.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted sideways on June 1, with the S&P 500 barely negative (-0.1%) and the NASDAQ marginally positive (+0.1%), reflecting a market in a consolidation phase after recent gains. No single macro catalyst dominated; instead, the session reflected a tug-of-war between investors locking in recent profits and buyers stepping in on any dip. Neutral tape days like this are common near month-end as institutional investors rebalance portfolios and fund managers mark their books.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於6月1日窄幅整理，標普500微跌0.1%，納斯達克則小升0.1%，市場整體呈觀望態勢。近期升市後，部分投資者傾向獲利回吐，但跌勢稍現即有買盤承接，多空力量大致平衡。此類平靜交投常見於月末，主要反映機構投資者的定期再平衡操作及基金月底結算需求。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that bets on stocks already moving in a strong direction to keep moving that way. The idea is that rising stocks attract more buyers (news coverage, analyst upgrades, fund inflows), which creates a self-reinforcing cycle — today's top candidates were chosen exactly this way, filtering for RSI in the 55–70 'bullish but not overbought' zone plus MACD confirmation.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動量投資是一種順勢而為的策略，押注已呈強勢的股票將繼續上行。其邏輯在於：股價上漲吸引更多買家（媒體報導、分析師調高評級、基金增持），形成自我強化的循環。今日選股正是採用此思路，篩選RSI介於55至70「強勢但未過熱」區間、同時具備MACD金叉確認的標的。
